real_product_prompts.prompt: Build a task management app with users, tasks, due dates, and status tracking
Create an e-commerce platform with products, shopping cart, user reviews, and checkout
Build a CRM with contact management, deal tracking, email logging, and sales reports
Create a blog platform with posts, comments, categories, tags, and author profiles
Build a project management tool with kanban boards, sprints, team assignments, and file attachments
Create a social media dashboard with post scheduling, analytics, and multi-platform posting
Build an inventory management system with stock tracking, low stock alerts, and purchase orders
Create a learning management system with courses, quizzes, student progress tracking, and certificates
Build a customer support ticketing system with priority levels, agent assignment, and response templates
Create a fitness tracking app with workout plans, exercise logging, progress charts, and goal setting

edge_cases.expected_behavior: ask for clarification or make reasonable assumptions

edge_cases.prompt: Build a system that does everything
edge_cases.expected_behavior: ask for clarification or make reasonable assumptions

edge_cases.prompt: Create a blog with posts and comments, but also no comments allowed
Build an app with public and private pages, but no authentication system
Create a store with products, cart, and no payments
app with users and admins but no user roles defined
Build a real-time chat app with messages, but no message storage
Build an app with premium gating but no payment system
